title: sageretia thea subsp. brandrethiana
intro: Sageretia thea subsp. brandrethiana, also known as the Brandrethiana or Brandreth Sageretia, is a rare and endangered plant species native to China. It belongs to the family Rhamnaceae and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever, inflammation, and pain. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Sageretia thea subsp. brandrethiana are prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
